reason_for_decision: The article clearly separates command-and-control from dashboards and single-system consoles, and it gives enough workflow and coordination depth to pass without revision.
strengths: The article keeps the central distinction between display and coordinated action clear throughout.
It gives practical value by showing how a platform links sensors, tasks, escalation, and incident state.
The failure-pattern section helps readers evaluate platforms more critically than marketing language alone.
summary_assessment: This is a strong Foundation article: it is readable, technically grounded, and useful enough to pass without revision.
